title: Team Members
seatUsageOverLimitTooltip: Current members exceed your plan limit. Deactivated members are not counted toward your seat usage.
workspaceSeatLimitPopoverBody: Your workspace is using {{used}} of {{total}} available seats. Upgrade your plan to add more members.
confirmDeleteTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this member?
confirmActivateTitle: Are you sure you want to change this member's status?
addMemberEmailHint: Members will be added to the team regardless of invitation acceptance status
memberEmailRequiredError: Please enter a valid email address
createMemberErrorMessage: Failed to add team member. Please try again.
updateMemberErrorMessage: Failed to update team member. Please try again.
roleDescriptionOwner: Full access to all team settings and billing
roleDescriptionAdmin: Can manage admins, team leads, and members across the workspace
roleDescriptionTeamLead: Can follow managed-member reporting and team coordination without admin access
roleDescriptionMember: Read-only for team membership management with access to assigned work
noResultFound: Type an email address and hit enter...
memberDeactivatedInviteSent: Member deactivated. Your invite has been sent.
memberDeactivatedProjectInviteSent: Member deactivated. Project invite sent for "{{projectName}}".
emailsStepDescription: Enter email addresses for team members you'd like to invite
personalMessagePlaceholder: Add a personal message to your invitation (optional)
select_team_lead_placeholder: Choose a Team Lead to assign members to
bulk_assignment_failed: Failed to assign members. Please try again.
please_select_team_lead_and_members: Please select a Team Lead and members to assign
create_team_leads_first: Create Team Lead roles first to use bulk assignment
no_team_leads_description: There are no Team Leads available in your team. Create Team Lead roles first.
projectInvite_emailRequired: Please enter at least one email address
projectInvite_linkCreateFailed: Failed to create project invitation link
projectInvite_linkCopied: Project invitation link copied to clipboard
projectInvite_teamRoleTooltip: Team role determines team-wide permissions. Project access level defaults to Member and can be changed later.
rolePermissionsDescription: Access levels define who can manage team members, reporting relationships, and admin-only workspace tools.
permissionInviteMembers: Can invite and update team members
permissionManageAllRoles: Can manage Admin, Team Lead, and Member roles
permissionAssignTeamLeads: Can assign or remove Team Lead reporting relationships
permissionAccessFinance: Can access finance and other admin-only workspace areas
permissionManageAdmins: Can manage Admin, Team Lead, and Member accounts except the owner
permissionManageManagedRoles: Can manage Team Lead and Member accounts only
permissionViewManagedReports: Can view managed-member reporting without admin access
permissionNoFinanceAccess: Cannot access finance settings or admin-only finance tools
permissionViewAssignedWork: Can work on assigned projects and tasks
permissionNoMemberManagement: Cannot invite, deactivate, delete, or reassign team members
permissionNoRoleChanges: Cannot change roles or Team Lead assignments
managerTooltip: Assign a Team Lead to manage this member. Only Members can be assigned to managers.
selectManagerPlaceholder: Select a Team Lead as manager
updateError: Failed to update team member. Please try again.
updateMemberNameErrorMessage: Failed to update member name. Please try again.
teamHierarchyDescription: Explore reporting lines, team lead coverage, and members who still need assignments.
teamHierarchyLoadError: Something went wrong while loading the team hierarchy.
teamHierarchySearchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, role, or team
teamHierarchyManagementDescription: Owners and admins who oversee the workspace.
teamHierarchyTeamDescription: Direct and indirect reports for this team lead.
teamHierarchyUnassignedDescription: Members who are not assigned to a team lead yet.
teamHierarchyEmptyDescription: Assign members to team leads to build the reporting structure.
